notes: Bumped after v0.90.0..v0.91.0 sweep (release 0.91.0). Files edited: reference/sso.mdx (partner-wide SSO / ownerScope, login-context endpoint, identity-first no-JIT partner sign-in, enforceSSO password-form collapse, password-reset SSO gate, Login Page Branding, Connect SSO identity linking, partner_login_branding + sso_providers partner_id schema, API reference additions); reference/users-and-roles.mdx (org-or-partner SSO + link); features/branding.mdx (aside distinguishing post-login branding from partner Login Branding); deploy/upgrades.mdx (new Pinning Agent and Watchdog Versions section — inherit-with-override, fail-closed; corrected Agent Update Scheduling precedence: partner-set fields win and lock per getOrgAgentUpdateConfig, previous 'org overrides partner' sentence was backwards); agents/enrollment-keys.mdx (daily 04:00 UTC expired-key purge + ENROLLMENT_KEY_PURGE_AFTER_DAYS grace, purge-expired bulk endpoint/button, Short code column + Hide expired toggle, audit action); deploy/environment.mdx (ENROLLMENT_KEY_CLEANUP_ENABLED / ENROLLMENT_KEY_PURGE_AFTER_DAYS); features/devices.mdx (NEW page — device list columns/filters, VPN presence #2185, battery/power status #2142 folded in from the v0.90.0 deferral); features/remote-access.mdx + features/event-log-forwarding.mdx (settings nav renames under Security & Access). docsMapping /devices repointed to /features/devices/. Explicitly skipped: org-SSO-under-RLS fix #2195/#2206 (bugfix restoring documented behavior); OAUTH_DCR_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS deliberately NOT added to deploy/environment.mdx (documented in features/mcp-server.mdx by convention); #2089 file-version detection clause remains out of devices.mdx (it is a Software Library detection-rules feature, still deferred); dev-only tooling and internal RLS/test-infra changes (below audience filter). Plan corrections against source: partner SSO login initiation is GET (not POST) /sso/login/partner/:partnerId; orgId with ownerScope=partner is ignored server-side rather than rejected.
